title: Skill Center
builtinDescription: Built-in skills are bundled with the app and require no installation. Click a card to use the skill in chat.

validation.title: Skill Validation Report
validation.readyToInstall: All checks passed. Ready to install.
validation.hasWarnings: Validation passed with {{count}} warning(s). You can still install.
validation.hasErrors: Validation failed with {{count}} error(s). Please fix the issues before installing.
validation.NO_SKILL_ENTRY: No SKILL.md found — not a valid skill directory
validation.SKILLMD_NO_FRONTMATTER: SKILL.md does not have a valid YAML frontmatter
validation.SKILLMD_INVALID_TOOL: Tool "{{tool}}" is not in the allowed tools whitelist
validation.PLUGIN_JSON_INVALID: plugin.json is not valid JSON or not an object
validation.PLUGIN_VERSION_NOT_SEMVER: plugin.json version "{{version}}" is not valid semver
validation.ID_TOO_LONG: Skill id must be 50 characters or less (got {{length}})
validation.COMMAND_NO_XML_WRAPPER: commands/{{file}} body is not wrapped in <{{command}}>...</{{command}}> tags
validation.TOOL_INVALID_NAME: Tool name "{{name}}" is not a valid JavaScript identifier
validation.TOOLS_NO_IMPLEMENTATION: Skill declares tools but has no implementation file
validation.NAME_MISMATCH: Name mismatch detected across SKILL.md, plugin.json, or directory name
validation.NO_SYSTEM_PROMPT: No prompts/main.txt — App chat has no system prompt
validation.NO_COMMANDS: No commands/ directory — no slash commands available
